title: sterculia henryi
intro: Sterculia henryi, also known as the Chinese trumpet tree, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sterculia henryi include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of asthma and other respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, with some parts also being used to make traditional Chinese medicine preparations such as pills and ointments.
